changelog: Solo Leveling System core matrix added: player-only system, status window, daily quest, rewards, penalty, store, job change, and shadow memory
Daily Quest now includes 100 push-ups, 100 sit-ups, 100 squats, and 10 km run or walk
System Store now lets Gold buy recovery items, reward boxes, and dungeon keys
Status Window now shows title, job, fatigue, and Job Change progress
